Update to 0.26.4

Update to 0.26.4

Tested on poudriere for 13.1 and portlint. 
Thanks to Jesús Daniel Colmenares Oviedo patch, we can now remove openssl as a dependency. See https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=266458#c3.
